question:
INSIDER THREAT
What threat do insiders with authorized access to information or information systems pose?
canonical_answer: They may wittingly or unwittingly use their authorized access to perform actions that result in the loss or degradation of resources or capabilities.

appears_in.title: 2022 Cyber Awareness Challenge Answers
